data.body: PROCESS CHANGE (user rule): a child must be CI-green (Gerrit Verified +1, or pre-flight make lint+typecheck+test green) before closing. Switching to: implement remaining children as commits WITHOUT closing; at endgame rebase onto origin/main, run full CI triad, push stack, wait Verified+1 per change, then close each child (bottom-first) + epic via completion verifier, submit. 10 already-closed children (pre-rule) will be CI-validated on push. Running full CI triad now as checkpoint on 4532 + the 10 committed.
